# GitHub repository metadata to set manually

## Description (the one-liner under the repo name)
Deterministic, LLM-free program repair: a stem blueprint evolves into a
domain-specialized one via generational search, with budget-controlled
evaluation and a committed ablation report.

## Topics
- program-repair
- genetic-algorithm
- python
- benchmark
- reproducible-research

## Suggested rename
stem_agent -> blueprint-repair
